labels.value: Add at least one email address in the "To" field.

labels.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected documents?

labels.value: Contact the administrator if the problem persists.

labels.value: No tasks found. Try another search criterion.

labels.value: Reassign Selected Documents To Other Claims

labels.value: Search by Subject, Case, Order or Contact

labels.value: Select documents and target before confirming.

labels.value: The selected template could not be loaded.

No invoices available for this order.

labels.shortDescription: Order label in invoice table group header

labels.value: Please select at least one service.
Select the orders and services you want to invoice.
